title: BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: HOOD RIVER CLINIC BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-clinic and virtual visits with licensed behavioral health providers for topics such as reducing anxiety and depression, managing family life and parenting, improving relationships, managing stress, improving sleep, building healthy habits, coping with an illness or injury, alcohol and substance use, and managing grief and loss. 849 Pacific Avenue Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Individuals who are established One Community Health patients Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (541) 386-6380 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 386-6380 FAX (541) 639-4142 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or appointment FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP, Medicare and private insurance. Offers sliding scale discount for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, other languages interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Hood River and Wasco Counties Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Bereavement and Grief Counseling Individual Counseling Individual Counseling * Anxiety Disorders Individual Counseling * Chronic Depression Individual Counseling * Major Depression Individual Counseling * People with Chronic Illnesses Stress Management Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - LGBTQ2+ HEALTH CARE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - INSURANCE ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC HUMAN REPRODUCTION - PREGNANCY AND POSTPARTUM SERVICES MUTUAL SUPPORT - SALUD DIABETES MANAGEMENT PROGRAM OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - MEDICAL SERVICES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOOD RIVER CLINIC
